/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/qiansai.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qiansai.dir/serial_port.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qiansai.dir/lvgl_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qiansai.dir/recorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qiansai.dir/photo.cpp.o -o qiansai  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/shingbd/workspace/qiansai/3rdparty/rknn_model_zoo/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 libretinaface.a utils.out/libfileutils.a utils.out/libimageutils.a utils.out/libimagedrawing.a ../3rdparty/rknn_model_zoo/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64/librknnrt.so -ldl -lm lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl.a -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 ../3rdparty/rknn_model_zoo/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64/librknnrt.so -ldl -lm ../3rdparty/rknn_model_zoo/3rdparty/librga/Linux/aarch64/librga.a ../3rdparty/rknn_model_zoo/3rdparty/jpeg_turbo/Linux/aarch64/libturbojpeg.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_thorvg.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl.a lvgl_build/lib/liblvgl_thorvg.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libdrm.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libevdev.so
